title: GitHub Ecosystem Mapping
description: Map the existing repositories and classify them by purpose, maturity and public value.
output: Repository cards, portfolio summaries and product case studies.

title: MicroBot Physical Validation
description: Use the MicroBot ecosystem as the flagship technical case study for evidence-based project development.
output: Hardware logs, dashboard screenshots, validation notes and demo videos.

title: Linux and Cybersecurity Lab
description: Connect defensive Linux and network security exercises to portfolio evidence.
output: Command reports, lab notes, sanitized screenshots and study summaries.

title: AI and Data Lab
description: Use existing notebooks and demos as technical evidence for data science and machine learning learning.
output: Case study summaries, screenshots and explanation cards.
